headline: AI radar update
insight: Recent AI, agent and developer-tooling signals collected from official and high-signal feeds.
portfolioAngle: Use these signals to decide whether new AI/agent capabilities deserve a future portfolio card.

items.title: Launching Health in ChatGPT
items.summary: Health in ChatGPT now lets eligible U.S. users securely connect medical records and Apple Health to get more personalized insights and better understand their health.

items.title: OpenAI is making big claims as it rolls out ChatGPT Health to everyone

items.title: Lawmakers prepare bill requiring AI ‘kill switch’
items.summary: Lawmakers are preparing to introduce an "AI Kill Switch Act" that would require AI companies to shut down or throttle their systems on orders from the Department of Homeland Security, according to a report from Politico....

items.title: Apple’s OpenAI lawsuit is about who gets to define the post-smartphone era

items.title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
items.summary: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.

items.title: How news organizations are using AI to advance their vital missions
items.summary: News organizations are using AI to strengthen reporting, grow audiences, and improve business operations, with OpenAI tools supporting journalists and publishers worldwide.

items.title: Advancing the next era of national science
items.summary: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.

items.title: Introducing OpenAI Presence
items.summary: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.

items.title: NTT DATA Group cuts incident analysis to 30 minutes with Codex
items.summary: NTT DATA Group uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to help 9,000 employees automate work, cut incident analysis to 30 minutes, and scale secure AI adoption.
